overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character walking through a foggy, rain-soaked urban street at night. The character proceeds along a sidewalk beside a concrete retaining wall, crosses a street intersection with other pedestrians, and takes cover behind a low wall near a commercial building corner in a cinematic game engine environment.

row of palm trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked residential sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall and palm trees. Street lamps pierce through the foggy night air while a vehicle passes by on the wet asphalt road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with digital billboards and crosswalk

events.description: character stops at crosswalk waiting for traffic signal to change
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider intersection area with bright digital billboards visible through the fog. The character stops at a crosswalk, then proceeds to cross the street alongside other pedestrians while traffic lights glow red. A street sign indicates the intersection of Sequoia.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and corner cover position

events.description: character crouches behind low concrete wall taking cover near building corner

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk then crouching behind a low wall to take cover near a building corner

white regulatory sign indicating speed limit of 40
short concrete barrier wall suitable for cover near the building corner

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the character continues along a commercial sidewalk passing a speed limit sign. The character then approaches a building corner and crouches behind a low concrete wall, taking cover in a tactical position while observing the street ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban environment that shifts from a quiet residential stretch to a bustling commercial intersection. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall and palm trees, where street lamps pierce through a foggy night as a vehicle passes on the wet asphalt. As the path opens into a wider intersection, the atmosphere becomes more vibrant with glowing red traffic lights and bright digital billboards visible through the mist while the character crosses the street at Sequoia alongside other pedestrians. The scene then shifts toward a commercial district, passing a speed limit sign before the camera follows the character as they approach a building corner. Finally, the movement settles as the character crouches behind a low concrete wall, taking a tactical cover position to observe the street ahead.
